inventory.purpose: Redirect anonymous visitors to the landing login unless the route is public.
* Reputation badges – Event Verified, Mentor, Community Contributor, etc.
Left-rail browse filters with shared geo control (SG-134).
Shared country / city / radius control for browse surfaces (SG-135).
Mini profile preview - no gender, pronouns, or orientation (those live on the full profile only).
Value for `<input type="datetime-local" />` in the viewer's local timezone.
Matches {@link SchedulePersonChip} with `variant="presenter"` (always program presenter profile route).
ECKE schedule embed with `dc-embed-ready` height hints (Phase 8).
Opens the global create-event wizard without leaving the current page.
Onboarding guide overlay - stub until Kink Social wires guide flows.
Tutorial overlay - stub until Kink Social wires full onboarding UI.
Camera QR scan for door kiosk - requires secure context (HTTPS or localhost).
Workspace base from context, or `/organizer/conventions/:slug` redirect path.
Prominent control to open the session drawer (assign people, edit, publish).
Stacked label + control with consistent label height so grid rows align.
Four-color presets that map 1:1 to `themeConfig` (accent / surface / elevated / slotPublished).
Organizer workspace main panel while bootstrap loads.
* Section switcher for organizer hubs (e.g. People → Signups / Staff / …).
Only show zones that have been placed away from the default center (or are being edited).
Cross-fade tab/panel swaps; pair with `dc-tab-content-enter` in dancecard-motion.css.
Extra pills after the eyebrow category — skips duplicates of primary category and difficulty.
Build strip sections from API articles when live data is available.
Education discover uses its own left rail - no duplicate Explore sub-nav.
Hero-style featured trending card for Explore mobile curation.
Feed interaction iconography - reactions (Love, Respect, Sympathize, Helpful) and community actions.
Mock/demo slug groups - full tab set including mock-only sections.
Compact photo grid for sidebar. Photos require approval before appearing.
Legacy: CommunityNavBar no longer duplicates browse links - show full nav in mobile menu.
Slim convention hub row - lives inside the feed column, not as a homepage billboard.
Short CC0 sample for mock-only audio attachment preview.
Home feed composer is status-only; long-form education posts use `/education/write`.
Decorative Dance Card dashboard preview — not functional.
Atmospheric hero background — gradients and abstract leather atmosphere.
Logged-out landing search - visible below header on small screens only.
Landing signup checkbox with 44px hit area (audit-safe).
Shared upload in-flight UI for profile photos and gallery adds.
Redirect authenticated members who have not finished first-time onboarding.
DB may still hold `/seed/paf/*` paths; serve via `/api/public-seed/paf/*` instead.
DB may still hold `/seed/paf/*` paths; serve via `/api/public-seed/paf/*` instead.
Convention organizer - full Dancecard kit shell and tabs.
Person/presenter avatar with initials gradient fallback.
Desktop cover band with overlapping avatar — identity zone top-left, actions top-right.
Desktop: writing left, photos right. Mobile: stacked.
* Desktop profile layout: cover header, 3-column grid (story | tabs | network).
Quick links for the Me tab — collapsed on mobile below profile tools.
Condensed story cards for desktop left rail.
Map full story props into desktop cover + sidebar slices.
Wrapper matching public profile story cards for edit sections.
Thin top bar while a route transition is in flight (UI_UX follow-up C1).
Global robots meta — noindex by default; public launch enables indexing on marketing pages.
Embedded blocked list (legacy privacy composite). Prefer `/settings/blocked`.
Dev-only note about push/email plumbing - not shown on the public notifications inbox.
* Authenticated mobile app shell — max-width, overflow guard, consistent horizontal padding.
Mobile floating create action — opens CreateSheet. Hidden on md+.
* Sticky primary actions for mobile — sits above bottom nav when present.
* Mobile-first page header with optional sticky behavior below site chrome.
Tag label pill - not linked until a real tag browse API exists.
Organizer / mod / admin dashboards — stacked cards on mobile.
Entity detail pages — profile, event, group, org, vendor, article.
* Directory / list pages — search, filters, responsive grid or list.
Feed surfaces — home, group, org activity.
* Mobile filter bottom sheet — canonical filter UX for directory routes.
Compact positive trust label for cards and headers - never shows negative signals.
Shared positive context in DM header - recipient never sees restriction labels.
* Shared card container - ECKE elevated panel (matches dancecard Panel).
* Consistent “coming soon” shell for placeholder routes (audit §4.4 / §4.6).
* Shared layout for long policy / legal document pages — draft banner, section anchors,
Signed-in user lacks access - explain why and offer a clear exit.
Feed rail / activity card placeholder grid.
ECKE-style rounded tab shell - children should be `TabShellButton` / `PillTab`.
Polished placeholder when a vendor listing has no product image or logo.
Full-bleed shop hero: banner strip + OVERLAY (text on image) or BELOW (card row for logo + title).
Links from a vendor shop to the people who run it on Kink Social (community profiles, not external store).
Soft, dismissible nudge when ZIP, birth date, or photo are missing.

Single organizer frame: sidebar, breadcrumbs, command palette, mobile tab collapse
Desktop sidebar + mobile bottom sheet from one filter state hook
Pill tabs with keyboard roving; scrollable on mobile
centered modal + mobile bottom sheet modes; wizard layout slot
